codeSystems.name: SwissMedicalSpecialities
codeSystems.title: SwissMedicalSpecialities
codeSystems.description: ValueSet for Swiss medical specialty areas (Fachbereiche) used in ambulatory care settings. Based on the regulation document 'Reglement Fachbereiche inkl. Liste der Fachbereiche' valid from January 1, 2026. Declared as fragment: only the codes actually referenced in this IG are listed here.

codeSystems.name: ChAlisParamTyp
codeSystems.title: CH ALIS ParamTyp
codeSystems.description: This value set defines the ParamTyp, which are displayed via CH ALIS Extension ParameterV40.

codeSystems.name: ChAlisPersonTyp
codeSystems.title: CH ALIS PersonTyp
codeSystems.description: This value set defines the PersonTyp.

codeSystems.name: LKAAT
codeSystems.title: LKAAT
codeSystems.description: Externally maintained ambulatory physician tariff catalogue (LKAAT) published by OAAT. Declared as not-present: its codes are referenced from this IG but not enumerated here, because the catalogue is owned and published externally.

codeSystems.name: BfsMedstats17Admitsource
codeSystems.title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 17 1.2.V02 - Aufenthaltsort vor dem Eintritt / Séjour avant l’admission / Luogo di soggiorno prima dell’ammissione
codeSystems.description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Unmittelbarer Aufenthaltsort vor dem Eintritt. Wo befand sich BFS der Patient / die Patientin?

codeSystems.name: BfsMedstats18Admittype
codeSystems.title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 18 1.2.V03 - Eintrittsart / Mode d’admission / Genere di ricovero
codeSystems.description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Beschreibung der Umstände des Eintritts. Wie wurde der BFS Patient / die Patientin aufgenommen?

codeSystems.name: BfsMedstats29Dischargeencounter
codeSystems.title: BFS Medizinische Statistik - 29 1.5.V04 - Behandlung nach Austritt / Prise en charge après la sortie / Trattamento dopo l’uscita
codeSystems.description: BFS defines variables for medical statistic (german, french, italian) see [BFS](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.7066232.html). Behandlung, Pflege, Rehabilitation nach dem Spitalaufenthalt. Es geht darum, den Behandlungserfolg resp. den Abhängigkeitsgrad bei Austritt anzugeben. Nur die am besten zutreffende Kategorie auswählen.

codeSystems.name: ChCoreEncounterParticipationType
codeSystems.title: ChCoreEncounterParticipationType
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate how an individual participates in an encounter. In Switzerland the primary care physician is added to the extensible base ValueSet.

codeSystems.name: ChCoreMaritalStatus
codeSystems.title: ChCoreMaritalStatus
codeSystems.description: MaritalStatus combined by fhir and eCH-11. See [maritalData - Zivilstandsangaben eCH-11](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.349276.html) and/or [BFS Amtlicher Katalog der Merkmale](https://www.bfs.admin.ch/bfs/de/home/statistiken/kataloge-datenbanken/publikationen.assetdetail.349276.html).

codeSystems.name: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.title: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: ChargeItemCode
codeSystems.title: ChargeItemCode
codeSystems.description: Example set of codes that can be used for billing purposes.

codeSystems.name: ChargeItemStatus
codeSystems.title: ChargeItemStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a ChargeItem.

codeSystems.name: ConditionCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

codeSystems.name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

codeSystems.name: Condition/DiagnosisSeverity
codeSystems.title: Condition/Diagnosis Severity
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition/Diagnosis severity grading.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStage
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage
codeSystems.description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStageType
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage Type
codeSystems.description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

codeSystems.name: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.title: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

codeSystems.name: ContactPointSystem
codeSystems.title: ContactPointSystem
codeSystems.description: Telecommunications form for contact point.

codeSystems.name: ContactPointUse
codeSystems.title: ContactPointUse
codeSystems.description: Use of contact point.

codeSystems.name: Currencies
codeSystems.title: CurrencyCode
codeSystems.description: Currency codes from ISO 4217 (see https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html)

codeSystems.name: FHIRDeviceTypes
codeSystems.title: FHIR Device Types
codeSystems.description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

codeSystems.name: DiagnosisRole
codeSystems.title: DiagnosisRole
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to express the role of a diagnosis on the Encounter or EpisodeOfCare record.

codeSystems.name: Diet
codeSystems.title: Diet
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate dietary preferences or restrictions a patient may have.

codeSystems.name: EncounterLocationStatus
codeSystems.title: EncounterLocationStatus
codeSystems.description: The status of the location.

codeSystems.name: EncounterReasonCodes
codeSystems.title: Encounter Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This examples value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate reasons for an encounter.

codeSystems.name: SpecialArrangements
codeSystems.title: Special arrangements
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the kinds of special arrangements in place for a patients visit.

codeSystems.name: SpecialCourtesy
codeSystems.title: Special courtesy
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate special courtesies provided to the patient.

codeSystems.name: EncounterStatus
codeSystems.title: EncounterStatus
codeSystems.description: Current state of the encounter.

codeSystems.name: EncounterType
codeSystems.title: Encounter type
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the type of encounter: a specific code indicating type of service provided.

codeSystems.name: ICD-10Codes
codeSystems.title: ICD-10 Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes sample ICD-10 codes.

codeSystems.name: Identifier Type Codes
codeSystems.title: IdentifierType
codeSystems.description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

codeSystems.name: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.title: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: LinkType
codeSystems.title: LinkType
codeSystems.description: The type of link between this patient resource and another patient resource.

codeSystems.name: LocationType
codeSystems.title: Location type
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the physical form of the Location.

codeSystems.name: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes
codeSystems.title: Manifestation and Symptom Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Manifestation and Symptom codes.

codeSystems.name: NameUse
codeSystems.title: NameUse
codeSystems.description: The use of a human name.

codeSystems.name: PatientContactRelationship
codeSystems.title: Patient Contact Relationship
codeSystems.description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.

codeSystems.name: ProcedurePerformerRoleCodes
codeSystems.title: Procedure Performer Role Codes
codeSystems.description: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a role of a procedure performer.

codeSystems.name: QuantityComparator
codeSystems.title: QuantityComparator
codeSystems.description: How the Quantity should be understood and represented.

codeSystems.name: ResourceType
codeSystems.title: ResourceType
codeSystems.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.

codeSystems.name: ServiceType
codeSystems.title: Service type
codeSystems.description: This value set defines an example set of codes of service-types.

codeSystems.description: FHIR Value set/code system definition for HL7 v2 table 0092 ( RE-ADMISSION INDICATOR)
